paper_title: Integration and analysis of pollen transcriptome data and Comparative male germline data

methods.description: This method involves using meta-analyses to identify genes with common expression and activities between multiple data sets, constructing in silico-derived co-expression networks based on the assumption that genes with similar expression patterns are likely to interact with each other.

steps.description: Collect 176 microarray data sets, including LM-microarray data separating tapetum and male gametophyte cells.
steps.searchable_summary: collect microarray data sets for co-expression analysis

steps.description: Perform co-expression analysis to identify 'meiosis' and 'pollen wall synthesis' sub-networks.
steps.searchable_summary: perform co-expression analysis to identify sub-networks

methods.description: This method involves incorporating cross-species comparisons, including transcriptome and proteome data, to identify homologues of genes co-expressed in different species.

steps.description: Collect transcriptome and proteome data from tobacco pollen tubes and roots.
steps.searchable_summary: collect transcriptome and proteome data for cross-species comparison

steps.description: Identify Arabidopsis homologues of genes co-expressed in tobacco pollen tubes and roots.
steps.searchable_summary: identify homologues in Arabidopsis from cross-species data

methods.description: This method applies Network Component Analysis to construct a regulatory network involving transcription factors and target genes during pollen development.

steps.description: Collect 23 data sets encompassing developmental and progamic phases.
Apply NCA to construct a regulatory network involving 19 TFs, 101 target genes, and 319 regulatory interactions.
steps.searchable_summary: apply NCA to construct regulatory network

methods.description: This method uses phylostratigraphic studies to analyze the origin of 'new' or 'orphan' genes in plants, focusing on the transcriptome age index.

steps.description: Collect pollen transcriptome data from Arabidopsis and rice.
steps.searchable_summary: collect pollen transcriptome data for phylostratigraphic analysis

steps.description: Analyze transcriptome age index to determine the phylogenetic age of the transcriptome.

methods.method_name: Comparative Analysis of Male Germline Data
methods.description: This method involves the comparative analysis of gene expression in the male germline using high-throughput screens and EST libraries.

steps.description: Collect EST library data for male gametes from various species.
steps.searchable_summary: collect EST library data for male gametes

steps.description: Perform comparative analysis to identify conserved gamete-expressed genes.
steps.searchable_summary: perform comparative analysis of EST data
